summary: Staff-level software engineer and AI solution architect with 8+ years of experience designing resilient, data-intensive web platforms. Blends pragmatic full-stack skills (React, TypeScript, Node, Go) with hands-on machine-learning deployments to ship customer-facing features quickly without sacrificing reliability.

description: Led a cross-functional squad that delivered an AI-assisted workflow builder used daily by 1.2k+ enterprise users.
Architected a multi-tenant event pipeline (Rust + Kafka + ClickHouse) that processes 500M events/day with <200ms query latency.
Rolled out an internal LLM service mesh powered by LangChain and managed fine-tuning jobs that reduced support response time by 42%.
Mentored six engineers, instituted RFC-driven design reviews, and partnered with product to balance velocity with guardrails.
Shipped the company's first real-time collaboration suite, enabling a new $6M ARR product line.
Introduced feature flagging + automated canary releases that cut failed deploys by 75%.
Partnered with design to build a component system in React + Storybook that accelerated delivery of marketing experiments.
Implemented analytics dashboards and alerting automations for Fortune 500 finance clients.
Owned integrations with major ATS/CRM systems and scaled ingestion pipelines 3x without downtime.

education.details: Focus: Human-computer interaction and distributed systems.

projects: Shipped a vector-search knowledge base template (Next.js + Supabase) adopted by 400+ startups.
Maintains "DeployKits", an open-source Terraform module library for reproducible preview environments.
Built a portfolio of automation workflows connecting Linear, Notion, and PagerDuty via custom Slack apps.
